title: daucus nodosus
intro: Daucus nodosus, also known as the Prickly Carrot or Wild Carrot, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Daucus nodosus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
